title: [release-1.4] [CI:BUILD] Cirrus: Migrate OSX task to M1
body:
Migrate our OSX build to a M1 instance, since Cirrus is sunsetting Intel-based macOS instances.

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>
(cherry picked from commit b5ac534960bd4188f7fd847cec3225f55714abc4)
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

comments.body:
From the failing test:
>   echo 'export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/go@1.16/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.profile

That does not match https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/022b6f54735ffbd6dd8363c83ed1eeb045dc1f5c/.cirrus.yml#L93-L94 , probably due to an intentional Homebrew change on M1: https://docs.brew.sh/FAQ#why-is-the-default-installation-prefix-opthomebrew-on-apple-silicon ).

Does changing the path to `/opt/homebrew` help? And if it does, we should probably update the more recent branches to also move to `/opt/homebrew`, or possibly (probably not?) drop that path override if it is completely unnecessary.
Oh yes, good catch, the path should be `opt/homebrew` for anything that is installed with brew on M1 macs
hmm, wonder why it can't find gpgme.h. Do the header file paths need to be changed for brew?
@ashley-cui do you know any place where I can see the list of files installed by brew? the homebrew page for gpgme doesn't show me anything (or maybe i'm looking in the wrong place)
AFAIK it shouldn't matter.. On main it works, but the path  is `export PATH=$GOPATH/bin:$PATH`, maybe try that?

> AFAIK it shouldn't matter.. On main it works, but the path is `export PATH=$GOPATH/bin:$PATH`, maybe try that?

The go: command not found is taken care of. But, now it's unable to find gpgme.h, would PATH handle that on brew?
Oh yeah, path should handle that in brew, I think adding `/opt/homebrew/bin` to the path might do the trick

Weird that it's still failing, as the only difference from main is in main the path  is `export PATH=$GOPATH/bin:$PATH`. But the paths you've used should covere everything so it should all work, I'm also a little stumped here

> Weird that it's still failing, as the only difference from main is in main the path is `export PATH=$GOPATH/bin:$PATH`. But the paths you've used should covere everything so it should all work, I'm also a little stumped here

@ashley-cui  i guess this should fail the same way on main branch then. Let me check there ..
